methodology: search_is ranks stock rules using only the in-sample window
admit_oos replays frozen IS finalists on the later OOS window
portfolio personas are materialized only when validation Sharpe >= 0.7, Sortino >= 0.7, or return >= 200%
persona materialization also requires validation max drawdown <= 65% unless that gate is disabled
highly correlated validation return paths keep only the best-scoring strategy; default correlation threshold is 0.95
